informal_pl: Średnia arytmetyczna (x+y)/2; świadek to złożenie chunków 040 (dodawanie) i 052 (half).
informal_en: Arithmetic mean (x+y)/2; witness composes chunk 040 (addition) with chunk 052 (half).
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm2_for_avg : ∃ t : EMLTerm₂, ∀ x y : ℝ, EMLTerm₂.eval x y t = (x + y) / 2 := by sorry
notes: Round 2 chunk; Table S2 step 14. Composition `half ∘ add` may require positivity bookkeeping when x+y ≤ 0; the paper-level identity is unconditional.
